item.name: Wind-up Porom
item.description:
The rosy cheeks and pronounced eyelashes indicate that this is the female half of a matching pair.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Porom minion.
item.tooltip:
This isn't a picnic we're going on, Palom.
   - Porom
item.specialactiondescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 150 to all enemies within range while reducing DEF by 30%.
Duration: 6s
